data.title: Salsify launches AI tools to automate product data management
data.description: A core part of the release is Angie; a conversational assistant built into Salsify’s platform. It allows users to perform complex configuration tasks and generate formulas through natural language prompts, reducing time spent on data preparation.

data.title: Canadian Tire reports data breach affecting ecommerce customers
data.description: The breach, identified on Oct. 2, involved a database containing names, addresses, email addresses and years of birth for online account holders of Canadian Tire, SportChek, Mark’s/L’Équipeur and Party City.

data.title: Generative AI begins to eclipse traditional search in B2B vendor discovery
data.description: More than half of tech buyers — 56% — said they rely on chatbots as a top source for vendor discovery, compared with 28% in other industries.

data.title: Albertsons grows digital sales more than 20% for eighth straight quarter in Q2
data.description: The retailer's ecommerce sales also grew at more than 10x the rate of its total sales and revenue in its fiscal Q2 2025.

data.title: Salesforce to launch Agentforce 360 access in ChatGPT
data.description: The companies announced multiple new integrations for Salesforce customers and ChatGPT users on the first day of the Dreamforce 2025 conference in San Francisco.
